title: WALS-UD Language Feature Mapping
layman_summary: Maps 116 Universal Dependencies treebanks to World Atlas of Language Structures features, linking language typology data to dependency treebanks for cross-linguistic research.
summary: Created a curated mapping dataset linking 116 UD treebanks to 5 WALS typological features (1A word order, 20A fusion, 26A exponence, 49A case marking, 51A alignment). The dataset achieves 84.5% high-confidence mappings via ISO 639-3 code matching. Each mapping includes confidence levels, match methodology, and complete WALS feature values with descriptions. The dataset is formatted for mixed-effects modeling of dependency distance distributions across UD treebanks with WALS predictors. Output includes full (116 examples), mini (3 examples), and preview versions in experiment pipeline format.
